shortDescription: Centralize ID generation — replace .add() and Date.now() with enterprise UUIDs
problem: 4 Firestore collections used .add() (auto-generated IDs) and 1 used Date.now()+Math.random() instead of the centralized enterprise-id.service.ts UUID system.
cause: These services were created before the enterprise ID system was established, or the ID system hadn't yet covered these prefixes.
solution: Added 4 new prefixes (fb, paud, eaud, lc) + 4 class methods + 4 convenience exports to enterprise-id.service.ts. Replaced .add() with .doc(generateXxxId()).set() in 5 files. Removed local generateContractId() from legal-contract.service.ts. Added NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT_COMPANY_ID env var to Vercel production.
testing: Grep verification: 0 .add() calls remaining in changed files. 0 Date.now()+Math.random() patterns. Vercel auto-deploy.
notes: Vercel env var NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT_COMPANY_ID set to comp_9c7c1a50-f370-466d-bdf7-aa7b2b2d7757. New ID formats: fb_uuid, paud_uuid, eaud_uuid, lc_uuid, notif_uuid.

commits.message: refactor: centralize ID generation — replace .add() and Date.now() with enterprise UUIDs
